basic_details.job_title: YSPUHF Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Scale Stenographer/ Field Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Dr. Yashwant Singh Parmar University of Horticulture & Forestry
basic_details.post_name: Junior Scale Stenographer / Field Assistant Gr-I
basic_details.short_information: Dr. Yashwant Singh Parmar University of Horticulture & Forestry (UHF) has published the Junior Scale Stenographer/ Field Assistant Gr-I Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. 03/2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 vacancies for Junior Scale Stenographer and Field Assistant Gr-I posts. Candidates aged between 18 and 45 years and holding 10+2 or equivalent qualification (10+2 Science for Field Assistant Gr-I), along with the prescribed shorthand and typing skills for the Stenographer post, are eligible to apply online on or before 20 August 2026. Candidates can easily access the offici

age_limit.age_details: 18 to 45 years (with relaxation for HP Govt. employees, Ex-Servicemen, SC/ ST/ OBC of HP, PwD of HP)
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age Relaxation: HP Govt. Employees: As per Government's instructions Ex-Servicemen HP: As per Government's instructions SC/ST/OBC of HP: 5 years PWD of HP: 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: 10+2 or equivalent for Junior Scale Stenographer, 10+2 Science for Field Assistant Gr-I. Specific shorthand and typing speeds required for Stenographer.
qualification.details: Junior Scale Stenographer (Job Trainee) [Post Code-801]: Should have passed 10+2 examination or its equivalent from a Board of School Education/University recognized by the Himachal Pradesh Government. Should possess the following speed in shorthand and typewriting in both the language i.e. English and Hindi at the time of initial recruitment. SPEED IN SHORTHAND: English=80 W.P.M., Hindi=70 W.P.M. SPEED IN TYPEWRITING ON COMPUTERS: English=40 W.P.M., Hindi=30 W.P.M. Should have the knowledge of Word Processing in Computer as prescribed by the recruiting authority. Field Assistant Gr-I (Job Trainee) [Post Code-802]: 10+2 Science from a recognized Board of School Education.

selection_process: Written Objective Type Examination (MCQ) Typing Test (on Computers) and Shorthand Test (Qualifying nature for Post Code 801) Documentation/Verification of documents/certificates
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the YSPUHF Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of YSPUHF to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: YSPUHF Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the YSPUHF Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download YSPUHF Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Junior Scale Stenographer on Job Trainee Basis
Field Assistant Gr-I on Job Trainee Basis

content_sections.heading: YSPUHF Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Scale Stenographer (Job Trainee) [Post Code-801]: Should have passed 10+2 examination or its equivalent from a Board of School Education/University recognized by the Himachal Pradesh Government. Should possess the following speed in shorthand and typewriting in both the language i.e. English and Hindi at the time of initial recruitment. SPEED IN SHORTHAND: English=80 W.P.M., Hindi=70 W.P.M. SPEED IN TYPEWRITING ON COMPUTERS: English=40 W.P.M., Hindi=30 W.P.M. Should have the knowledge of Word Processing in Computer as prescribed by the recruiting authority. Field Assistant Gr-I (Job Trainee) [Post Code-802]: 10+2 Science from a recognized Board of School Education.

Ex-Servicemen of HP (who are released from Defence Services after completion of normal tenure) / Visually Impaired of HP.

content_sections.heading: YSPUHF Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Objective Type Examination (MCQ) Typing Test (on Computers) and Shorthand Test (Qualifying nature for Post Code 801) Documentation/Verification of documents/certificates

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the YSPUHF Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of YSPUHF to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the YSPUHF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the YSPUHF recruitment is 20 August 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Junior Scale Stenographer post?
faq.answer: For the Junior Scale Stenographer post, candidates must have passed the 10+2 examination or its equivalent, along with specific shorthand and typing speeds in English and Hindi, and knowledge of Word Processing.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all posts is between 18 to 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for certain categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by YSPUHF for the Junior Scale Stenographer and Field Assistant Gr-I posts.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General Category candidates is ₹1200/-. Different fees are applicable for other categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Objective Type Examination, a Typing Test and Shorthand Test (for Stenographer), and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any relaxation in the upper age limit?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST/OBC of HP and PWD of HP candidates. Relaxation for HP Govt. Employees and Ex-Servicemen HP is as per government instructions.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Field Assistant Gr-I post?
faq.answer: The Field Assistant Gr-I post offers a fixed monthly consolidated amount of ₹15,500/-.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from other states apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates from other states can apply, but they will be considered under the General Category and will have to pay the corresponding application fee.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for YSPUHF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
